**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Fanjing Technology Industrial Co., Ltd. represents a classic legacy trading shell that has transitioned over decades. Established in 1996, its former name, 'Jiangsu Fanjing Trading Co., Ltd.', accurately reflects its true commercial DNA. Despite its current official classification under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing', the entity operates with 0 insured employees as of 2024 out of a commercial apartment (Room 605, Junlin International Plaza). This completely nullifies any claims of physical manufacturing, including its listed scope for 'copier developing materials'. Instead, the company functions as an asset-light, all-encompassing wholesale distributor (handling everything from computer parts and HVAC equipment to agricultural products and clothing) and a potential consulting/asset-management shell. Its 3 million RMB capital and zero-headcount status strongly suggest it acts as a localized procurement, billing, or dormant holding vehicle for its owner.
